brief_html: This message performs two operations. First, it checks if the client's logon was successful. Second, it calculates the data for the server's reply to SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGONPROOF (0x54). If this data is not correct, then the client will not accept the logon attempt as valid.
format:
(UINT32) Slot index
(UINT32) [5] Data from client's SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGONPROOF (0x54)
(STRING) Client's account name
remarks_html: This message performs two operations. First, it checks if the client's logon was successful. Second, it calculates the data for the server's reply to SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGONPROOF (0x54). If this data is not correct, then the client will not accept the logon attempt as valid.
